title: Zosimos of Panopolis
subtitle: The first alchemical author with a face, c. 300 CE

narrative.intro: The earliest alchemist whose writings survive under his own name: visionary treatises, letters to Theosebeia, and working recipes, radiating from Greco-Roman Egypt.
narrative.provenance_note: Events involving Zosimos (17 in corpus). Locations are where events are recorded, not a verified itinerary.
narrative.design_note: Lapis & Gold: a visionary of late antiquity — dream-tribunals and spirit-stills — set on the deep blue of late-antique luxury pigment.
